holdings.infoBox: FCOM is an equity ETF with a total of 91 individual holdings. The top holdings are Meta Platforms stock at 22.04%, Alphabet at 14.37%, Alphabet at 7.68%, The Walt Disney Company at 4.53%, and Verizon Communications at 4.48%.

overview.description: The Fidelity MSCI Communication Services Index ETF (FCOM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of stocks in the US communication services sector. FCOM was launched on Oct 21, 2013 and is issued by Fidelity.
infoTable: MSCI USA IMI Communication Services 25/50 Index
